scenarios.narrative_one_liner: The AI-power premium deflates: PJM capacity reverts toward the floor, hyperscalers cut capex and PPAs stall, Calpine synergies disappoint, and CEG de-rates to a VST-level ~14x on normalized ~$12 EPS.
scenarios.narrative_long: A hyperscaler capex guide-down fires all three channels at once - multiple compression, stalled PPA conversions, softer power curves. PJM capacity reverts from the cap toward the $179.55 floor on the open out-year book; the 45U floor (~$0 today) only protects a much lower earnings level; Calpine gas margins normalize from peak. The market re-rates CEG to Vistra's ~14x on a normalized $12.00 FY27E EPS.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 14x P/E = de-rate to Vistra's level - the premium fully erased as the AI/nuclear-scarcity narrative deflates and the gas mix dominates.

eps_bridge.label: PJM capacity reverts from cap toward CONE floor on the open out-year book
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: PJM BRA cap $333 vs floor $179.55

eps_bridge.label: Calpine synergies disappoint + gas-margin normalization
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: Calpine gas bought near peak vs NRG/VST ~7-7.5x

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Soft de-rate: power/capacity normalizes modestly, FERC FTM economics compress PPA margin and delay conversions, and the multiple compresses to ~16x on ~$12.75 EPS - the stock works toward the bear floor.
scenarios.narrative_long: The premium partially erodes as the cohort de-rates and the Calpine gas mix dilutes the multiple. PJM capacity stays above floor but off peak; hyperscaler conversions are delayed (FTM) rather than dead. Multiple settles ~16x - above the trough but below the recent ~21x - on a $12.75 FY27E EPS.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 16x = partial de-rate; between VST (~14x) and CEG's recent ~21x, pricing cyclicality + the gas-mix dilution.

eps_bridge.label: Power / capacity normalization (partial)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: PJM capacity off peak; ERCOT/CAISO spark normalization

eps_bridge.label: FERC FTM economics compress PPA margin + conversion delay

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: The de-rate stabilizes: Calpine delivers ~$2/share accretion, the >20% CAGR holds, PPA conversions resume FTM post-June framework, and CEG holds ~19x (FY27E) - roughly its current multiple - on $13.50 EPS.
scenarios.narrative_long: FY2026 guidance ($11-12) is met and Calpine accretion (~$2/share) plus uprates support the >20% base-EPS CAGR. The June-2026 FERC framework lets paused hyperscaler PPAs convert (FTM, at a modest margin haircut). The premium compresses only modestly as the gas mix dilutes the multiple; the stock holds ~19x FY27E - essentially where it trades now after the ~40% drawdown - on $13.50 EPS.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 19x FY27E ~ in line with the current ~18x forward after the de-rate; a modest premium to VST justified by nuclear scarcity + IG + 45U floor, net of the Calpine gas dilution.

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: PPA conversions resume and new deals sign, the >20% CAGR is reaffirmed with Calpine on track, and CEG re-rates to ~22x on $14.50 EPS as the nuclear-scarcity premium re-expands.
scenarios.narrative_long: The June-2026 framework enables FTM hyperscaler PPAs; CEG signs incremental premium nuclear deals and delivers the >20% CAGR with Calpine synergies on track. The market re-credits the scarcity premium and re-rates to ~22x on a $14.50 FY27E EPS - back toward where CEG traded before the drawdown.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 22x = re-rate toward CEG's pre-drawdown multiple; premium re-expands on PPA conversion + delivered CAGR.

eps_bridge.label: >20% base-EPS CAGR delivery (Calpine accretion + uprates)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: CEG >20% base EPS CAGR 2026-2029 target

eps_bridge.label: Hyperscaler PPA conversions resume FTM post-June framework

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Nuclear-scarcity supercycle: multiple new premium PPAs, capacity durability proven, Calpine synergy beat + buyback compounding on the de-rated price; CEG re-rates to ~25x on $15.50 EPS.
scenarios.narrative_long: Structural AI-power demand sustains a multi-year nuclear premium; CEG converts a large share of its ~5 GW pipeline to premium long-dated PPAs, beats Calpine synergies, and compounds EPS via buyback at the de-rated price. Multiple approaches ~25x on a $15.50 FY27E EPS.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 25x approaches CEG's pre-drawdown peak multiple; tail re-rate predicated on durable premium-PPA conversion + a demand supercycle.

eps_bridge.label: Multiple incremental premium hyperscaler nuclear PPAs (scarcity re-rate)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S4: ~5 GW pipeline in PJM/ERCOT queues

eps_bridge.label: Calpine synergy beat + buyback compounding on the de-rated price

headline.headline_text: CEG at $247.12 carries a probability-weighted 12-month expected return of +3.0% (source-conditional Hold); the call is conditional on the FY2026 Adjusted Operating EPS guide ($11-12, S3) and the >20% base-EPS CAGR holding post-Calpine, and on hyperscaler PPA conversions resuming under the June-2026 FERC framework - scenario-weighted range strong_bear $168.00 (-32.0%) to strong_bull $387.50 (+56.8%). The de-rate is already ~40% done (off the $412 high to a 52-wk low), and the headline +50% Street PT is a stale-target artifact being cut; the premium on cyclical-peak earnings keeps it two-sided.
